chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهَا وَ مَا لَهَا مِنَ الصَّدَاقِ وَ الْعِدَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 46 – The woman widowed from her husband and not having been slept with, and what is for her from the dower, and the waiting period

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/203)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/203)

parts.text: عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

text: فِي الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا إِنَّ لَهَا نِصْفَ الصَّدَاقِ وَ لَهَا الْمِيرَاثُ وَ عَلَيْهَا الْعِدَّةُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘With regards to the woman widowed from her husband and he had not touched her, for her is half the dower, and for her is the inheritance, and upon her is the waiting period’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from all from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajj aj from a man who has said the following: “About the case of a woman whose husband dies before going to bed with her, Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘She deserves one-half of mahr (dower), complete inheritance and must count complete waiting period.’”
